description: A schema for generating commerce user segments and promotions.

userSegments.description: An array of logical user segments targeted for personalization.

description.description: A detailed description of who belongs to this segment.

externalReferenceCode.description: Unique external reference code for the user segment.

name.description: The name of the user segment.

promotions.description: An array of commerce promotions targeted at specific segments.

discountPercentage.description: The percentage discount for the promotion.

externalReferenceCode.description: Unique external reference code for the promotion.

targetSegmentName.description: The name of the user segment this promotion targets.

title: Promo
